query: SELECT oi.id, oi.menuItemId, oi.itemName, oi.itemImageUrl, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, mi.id as miId, mi.name as miName FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.menuItemId = mi.id WHERE oi.orderId = (SELECT id FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = 'PED32254670' LIMIT 1);
